_doc: Router config mapping skills to voice profiles. 'profiles' maps profile name -> {file, description}, where 'file' is relative to resources/voice-profiles/. 'skills' maps skill name -> profile name; a value may also be an array of profile names for future multi-profile composability (not exercised today, but consumers must tolerate both string and array). Standalone config, independent of model-tiers.json and sync-model-tiers.py.

dev-office.description: Default professional dev-office voice for PR review and revision output.
